title: Hittable
description: A mod that makes mobs glow if they are within your reach.
body:
# About
Simply what the description says. It uses the entity found by minecraft itself and makes them glow, so it's quite accurate. If you have any issues, [please create an issue on github](https://github.com/Emirlol/Hittable/issues) so I can try and fix them.

# Configuring
Either use modmenu or run the command `/hittable config`.

-------
